mapper.select: SELECT f.*, ft.ref_value AS feedback_type_desc, rt.ref_value AS rating_desc FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN reference ft ON f.feedback_type = ft.ref_code AND ft.ref_type = 'feedback_type' AND ft.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN reference rt ON f.rating = rt.ref_code AND rt.ref_type = 'rating' AND rt.is_active = 1 WHERE f.id = #{id}

SELECT f.*, ft.ref_value AS feedback_type_desc, rt.ref_value AS rating_desc FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN reference ft ON f.feedback_type = ft.ref_code AND ft.ref_type = 'feedback_type' AND ft.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN reference rt ON f.rating = rt.ref_code AND rt.ref_type = 'rating' AND rt.is_active = 1 ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT f.*, ft.ref_value AS feedback_type_desc, rt.ref_value AS rating_desc FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN reference ft ON f.feedback_type = ft.ref_code AND ft.ref_type = 'feedback_type' AND ft.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN reference rt ON f.rating = rt.ref_code AND rt.ref_type = 'rating' AND rt.is_active = 1 WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT f.*, ft.ref_value AS feedback_type_desc, rt.ref_value AS rating_desc FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN reference ft ON f.feedback_type = ft.ref_code AND ft.ref_type = 'feedback_type' AND ft.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN reference rt ON f.rating = rt.ref_code AND rt.ref_type = 'rating' AND rt.is_active = 1 WHERE f.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback (order_id, user_id, feedback_type, rating, content, solution, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{feedbackType}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{solution}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE feedback SET solution = #{solution}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
